metodos.codigoOriginal:
Do Case
	Case thisform.opt_Agru.Value = 1
		Report Form SigReAt2 Preview NoConsole
	OtherWise
		Report Form SigReAt3 Preview NoConsole

Endcase

If Used('CrSigCdCli')
	Use In CrSigCdCli
EndIf
If Used('CrSigCdPro')
	Use In CrSigCdPro
EndIf

=DoDefault()

With ThisForm
	.poDataMgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector', ThisForm.Name)

	If (.poDataMgr.pnIdconn > 0)
		lcQuery = [Select Codigos, Descrs ] + ;
				    [From SigCdGcr ] + ;
				   [Where GerBals = 1]

		If (ThisForm.poDataMgr.SqlExecute(lcQuery, 'CrSigCdGcr') < 1)
			=MessageBox('Favor Reinicializar o Processo!!!', 16, 'Falha na Conexăo (CrSigCdGcr)')
			Return 0
		EndIf
		Select CrSigCdGcr
		Index On Codigos Tag BalCodigo
		Index On Descrs  Tag BalDescrs

		lcQuery = [Select 0 As Marca, Cods, ... [TRUNCADO]

Do Case
	Case thisform.opt_Agru.Value = 1
		Report Form SigReAt2 To Print Prompt NoConsole
	Case thisform.opt_Agru.Value = 2
		Report Form SigReAt3 To Print Prompt NoConsole
Endcase

If (This.Value <> 4) && Encerrar
	If Empty(thisform.get_cd_moeda.Value)
		Messagebox('Moeda de conversăo é obrigatória.',64,'Aviso')
		thisform.get_cd_moeda.SetFocus()
		Return .f.
